effect.subject: underline_and_italic_styling
effect.reserved_for: hyperlinks (underline); study names, notes, and citations (italic)

rule_text: No underlining except real hyperlinks. No italic for emphasis in patient copy — reserve italics for study names, notes ('Note:'), and citations.
intent: Keep underline exclusive to links and italic exclusive to citations/notes so styling reads unambiguously.
summary: No underlining except hyperlinks; italics only for study names, notes ('Note:'), and citations; no italics for emphasis in patient copy.
